notes: Solid Tetris implementation with DAS/ARR, ghost piece, lock delay, line clear animation, bag randomizer, and audio; minor issues include non-standard wall kick table and HUD layout slightly off-canvas for some elements.
A major bug in the line clearing logic (unshifting the board array inside a bottom-to-top loop) causes multiple line clears to delete the wrong rows, leaving gaps and breaking the core gameplay loop.
Solid playable Tetris with line clears, ghost piece, next preview, scoring and pause, but it lacks full standard behavior like proper SRS/hold/soft-drop polish and has some input/lock-delay quirks.
